comment.body: From Bessent: (1) He expects the tariff negotiation process to take the full 90 days from the pause because it isn’t just tariffs.  It is also anti-competitive tax and regulation policy, and currency policy.  (2) China is somewhat unusual in history because it is not only the US’ major trading partner but also our major military rival.  (3) There seems to be a strategic focus on South and Central America to prevent the Chinese government from gaining a strong foothold there.
comment.raw_body: From Bessent: (1) He expects the tariff negotiation process to take the full 90 days from the pause because it isn’t just tariffs.  It is also anti-competitive tax and regulation policy, and currency policy.  (2) China is somewhat unusual in history because it is not only the US’ major trading partner but also our major military rival.  (3) There seems to be a strategic focus on South and Central America to prevent the Chinese government from gaining a strong foothold there.

comment.body:
SPX Trading Plan: April 15
Based on the combined analysis, here's an integrated trading plan with key levels and potential price paths:
Main Pivot Points
5395: Primary pivot for today's action
5400: Critical inflection point where gamma profile shifts from negative to positive
5451: Mechanical pivot around 1PM from flow perspective
Key Levels & Speed Zones
Downside Levels
5365: First buy-the-dip opportunity unless in free fall
5340: Critical centroid level - downside gamma increases sharply below this
5284-5300: Volume pocket and beginning of stabilization zone
5205-5284: "Sticky" range with stabilizing gamma effect
Upside Levels
5425-5430: Enter positive gamma territory - bullish continuation
5440: Methodical grind higher
5455-5470: Break of Wednesday highs could trigger acceleration
5475: Approaching magnetic effect from 5500/5530 bear call spread
5500/5530: Significant bear call spread creates resistance zone
Price Path Scenarios
Above 5400 Path
Gamma profile turns positive (slope +16.78%)
Volatility should make higher lows but lower highs as price moves up
Charm flows are flat-to-supportive
5451 around 1PM: Watch for potential pivot from mechanical flows
Above 5475: Potential magnetic effect toward 5500 bear call spread
Below 5400 Path
Speed profile turns sharply negative (slope -41.29%)
Below 5340 (centroid): Downside gamma accelerates
If momentum controlled: Expect longer spot/vol realized intraday beta
If vol declines too fast: Expect pivot support rejecting momentum
If vol catches up: Can fall below 5205
5284-5205 range: Should provide stabilization unless volatility spikes
Overall Context
Daily straddle range: 5330-5480
Net negative speed profile (avg slope -13.63%)
VIX expiration tomorrow creates potential for erratic price action
Significant bear call spread at 5500/5530 contains upside
The 5400 level represents the critical dividing line between positive and negative gamma regimes, with the centroid at 5340 serving as a key reference point for acceleration risk to the downside.
